title: Anthropic Follows SpaceX Playbook, Claude-Parent Reportedly Pursuing Multibillion-Dollar Credit Lines Ahead of IPO
excerpt: Anthropic is reportedly working with major banks to expand its borrowing capacity as the artificial intelligence startup gears up for a potential public list...
content_html:
Benzinga and Yahoo Finance LLC may earn commission or revenue on some items through the links below.

Anthropic is reportedly working with major banks to expand its borrowing capacity as the artificial intelligence startup gears up for a potential public listing later this year.

OpenAI Rival Anthropic Reportedly Seeks Fresh Bank Credit For IPO

Anthropic is in talks with banks to secure several billion dollars in new credit lines ahead of its planned initial public offering, investing.com reported (via The Information).

The report said the new financing would increase the company's existing $2.5 billion five-year revolving credit facility, obtained from lenders last year.

Don't Miss:

  • A single bad hire can set a startup back years. Here are the 5 hires founders most often misjudge — and why

  • Still Learning the Market? These 50 Must-Know Terms Can Help You Catch Up Fast

Anthropic did not immediately respond to Benzinga's request for comments.

A revolving credit facility gives companies access to funds that can be borrowed, repaid and borrowed again as needed, providing financial flexibility without requiring immediate use of the full amount.

Expanding credit facilities before an IPO is a common move for companies preparing to enter public markets. The same banks that extend these credit lines often serve as underwriters for the share sale.

Elon Musk's Space Exploration Technologies Corp followed a similar approach, increasing its credit facility with several of its IPO bankers roughly a month before its June public offering.

See Also: Avoid the #1 Investing Mistake: How Your 'Safe' Holdings Could Be Costing You Big Time

Anthropic Accelerates IPO Plans As October Debut Looms

The report comes as Anthropic appears to be accelerating preparations for an IPO.

Earlier Wednesday, it was reported that the AI startup had begun high-level meetings with investors and could debut on the public markets as soon as October.

In May, Anthropic surpassed OpenAI to become the world's most valuable startup after raising $65 billion in its Series H funding round, which valued the company at $965 billion.

Meanwhile, rival OpenAI is also targeting a trillion-dollar IPO, though recent reports suggest its public listing could be delayed until 2027.

Photo Courtesy: gguy on Shutterstock.com

content_html_zh:
Benzinga 和 Yahoo Finance LLC 可能通过以下链接赚取某些项目的佣金或收入。

据报道，Anthropic 正在与主要银行合作，扩大其借贷能力，这家人工智能初创公司正为今年晚些时候可能的公开上市做准备。

据报道 OpenAI 竞争对手 Anthropic 正在寻求新的银行信贷以进行 IPO

据investing.com报道（来自The Information），Anthropic正在与银行进行谈判，以在其计划的首次公开募股之前获得数十亿美元的新信贷额度。

报告称，新的融资将增加该公司去年从贷方获得的现有 25 亿美元五年期循环信贷额度。

不要错过：

  • 一次糟糕的招聘可能会让一家初创企业倒退数年。 以下是创始人最常误判的 5 名员工——以及原因
  • 还在学习市场吗？ 这 50 个必须知道的术语可以帮助您快速跟上

Anthropic 没有立即回应 Benzinga 的置评请求。

循环信贷便利使公司能够根据需要借入、偿还和再次借入资金，从而提供财务灵活性，而无需立即使用全额资金。

对于准备进入公开市场的公司来说，在首次公开募股之前扩大信贷额度是常见的举措。 提供这些信贷额度的银行通常充当股票销售的承销商。

埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 的太空探索技术公司 (Space Exploration Technologies Corp) 也采取了类似的做法，在 6 月份公开募股前大约一个月，增加了其几家 IPO 银行家的信贷额度。

另请参阅：避免第一大投资错误：您的“安全”资产可能会花费您大量时间

Anthropic 加速 IPO 计划，十月上市迫在眉睫

该报告发布之际，Anthropic 似乎正在加速 IPO 的准备工作。

周三早些时候，有报道称，这家人工智能初创公司已开始与投资者举行高层会议，最快可能于 10 月份在公开市场上市。

今年 5 月，Anthropic 在 H 轮融资中筹集了 650 亿美元资金，超越 OpenAI，成为全球最有价值的初创公司，该轮融资使该公司估值达到 9650 亿美元。

与此同时，竞争对手 OpenAI 也瞄准了万亿美元的 IPO，尽管最近的报道表明其公开上市可能会推迟到 2027 年。
